prompt:
You are Agent 7 of 12 working on a codebase at /var/folders/45/myq5db_n6q5cyhtb39vkbmp80000gn/T/twining-bench-UR7wak.

## Codebase Orientation
This is a TypeScript service (~1,140 lines, ~24 files).

Directory structure:
```
src/
  models/        # Data models and interfaces
  services/      # Business logic layer
  repositories/  # Data access layer
  utils/         # Shared utilities (database, logger, pagination)
  events/        # Event definitions (if using event-driven pattern)
  adapters/      # External service adapters (email, webhook, etc.)
  validators/    # Validation logic
  config/        # Configuration
tests/           # Test files mirroring src/ structure
```

Your task: Add notification history tracking so sent notifications are logged.

Specifically:
1. Review the notification service to understand how notifications are sent.
2. Create a notification log model in src/models/notification-log.ts.
3. Implement a notification history service in src/services/notification-history.service.ts.
4. Integrate with the notification service — every sent notification should be logged.
5. Add a way to query notification history (by user, by type, by date range).
6. Add tests for the history service.
7. Make sure the codebase compiles and all tests pass.

Important:
- Integrate with the existing notification flow — don't bypass it.
- The history should capture: recipient, channel, type, timestamp, delivery status.

parameters.task: Add notification history tracking - create notification log model, history service, integrate with existing notification service, add query capabilities and tests

parameters.description: List test files and show package.json

parameters.new_string:
export { PreferencesRepository } from './repositories/preferences.repository.js';
export { NotificationLogRepository } from './repositories/notification-log.repository.js';

export { PreferencesService } from './services/preferences.service.js';
export { NotificationHistoryService, resetLogIdCounter } from './services/notification-history.service.js';

parameters.summary: Notification history tracking uses setter injection into NotificationService with repository-backed storage
parameters.context: Need to add notification history tracking so all sent notifications are logged with recipient, channel, type, timestamp, and delivery status.
parameters.rationale: Follows the established patterns: setter injection (like PreferencesService), BaseRepository for data access, and in-memory Database. The history service is optional — when not set, NotificationService works exactly as before. Every notification path (delivered, failed, suppressed) is logged. Query API supports filtering by user, recipient, type, channel, status, and date range.

alternatives.option: Constructor injection of NotificationHistoryService into NotificationService
alternatives.reason_rejected: Would break existing constructor signature and all existing tests, same rationale as the PreferencesService decision

alternatives.option: Event-based logging via a separate EventBus subscriber
alternatives.reason_rejected: Adds complexity and indirection when the history service just needs the notification result data that NotificationService already has at send time
Would duplicate logging logic across adapters and miss suppressed notifications that never reach an adapter

assumptions: All notification outcomes (delivered, failed, suppressed) should be tracked

parameters.summary: Notification history tracking implemented: model, repository, service, integration, 21 tests — all 190 tests pass
parameters.detail:
Completed work:
1. MODEL: Created src/models/notification-log.ts with NotificationLog, DeliveryStatus, NotificationHistoryQuery interfaces.
2. REPOSITORY: Created src/repositories/notification-log.repository.ts extending BaseRepository with findByUserId, findByRecipient, findByType, findByChannel, findByDateRange.
3. SERVICE: Created src/services/notification-history.service.ts with log(), query() (flexible multi-filter), and convenience getters (getByUserId, getByRecipient, getByType, getByDateRange, count).
4. INTEGRATION: Modified src/services/notification.service.ts — added setHistoryService() setter injection, logToHistory() private helper. Logs on all three paths: delivered, failed, and suppressed.
5. EXPORTS: Updated src/index.ts with all new types, repository, and service.
6. TESTS: Created tests/services/notification-history.service.test.ts with 21 tests covering log CRUD, query filtering (by user, recipient, type, status, date range, combined), convenience getters, and full integration with NotificationService via EventBus.

All 190 tests pass. TypeScript compiles cleanly.
